calendar.description: MCP server for calendar operations (availability checking and event creation)

tasks.description: MCP server for task management (create, update, list, and duplicate checking)

notes.description: MCP server for notes management (search and save meeting notes)

competition_note: This configuration demonstrates MCP integration for APAC Google competition. All 3 MCP servers wrap existing database operations to satisfy the 'Integrate multiple tools via MCP' requirement while maintaining system stability.
